subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the Blessed Tree! Thy letters have been received, embodying meanings and principles that are steadfast in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من الشجره المبارکه مکاتیب آن حضرت رسید معانی مبانی ثبوت بر
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @law of pilgrimage
